fixes: force-emit prefers whitespace only (not arbitrary argmax)

highlights: E35 honest inventory-in-prompt: first ship-gates pass without silent gold.placeholders leakage (inventory surfaced into prompt, then extracted)
E36 decode scaling on E35 ckpt also clears ship gates; ood parse lifts 0.5 → 0.75 via BoN+remask
E31/E33 trust-gate path improves adversarial parse (0.75) but fidelity stays 0 without honest inventory / template fill
E30/E32 alone underfit at 40 CPU steps without template fill (parse=0) — same pattern as V3 E18
E34 latent MoE remains deferred (skipped by runner)
Prior V3 E20/E29 passes used gold.placeholders at eval; E35 is the honest successor
v3_baseline_note: See prior commit / history for E18–E29 fixture clears. Those used gold placeholder inventory for template fill.
